violations.text: The floors behind the refrigeration units and near the classroom doors have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

Soap and paper towel dispensers were observed at the three bay sink. A sink used for FOOD preparation or UTENSIL washing, or a service sink or curbed cleaning facility used for the disposal of mop water or similar wastes, may not be provided with the handwashing aids and devices required for a HANDWASHING SINK Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings observed throughout the kitchen and ware-washing areas. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
The ceiling in the ware-washing and kitchen areas are covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
